calendar.matters:
Petitiom To Instruct Trustee Regarding Sale Of Trust Assets And Termination Of Trust.
Off Calendar Jun-20-2016 Off Calendar

Petitiom To Instruct Trustee Regarding Sale Of Trust Assets And Termination Of Trust.
Off Calendar Apr-25-2016 Continued To Jun-20-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dan Newbold for (petitioner) Renate Bollig. Frederick Crombie for (co-trustee) Sandro Sidella. Alicia Gamez for (non-party beneficiary) Tania Sidella.

The Court confirmed that all parties were on board for June 20, 2016 and that it would like to set a trial date. Mr. Newbold stated that they are close to settlement, that they should have an agreement in a couple of weeks and that a trial date was not necessary. The petition to instruct trustee regarding sale of trust assets and termination of trust was continued to June 20, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
